ingredients.item: 1 Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C). Line a large sheet pan with parchment paper.
ingredients.original: 1 Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C). Line a large sheet pan with parchment paper.

ingredients.item: 2 In a large bowl, combine the flour, sugar, baking powder, and cardamom and mix until well incorporated.
ingredients.original: 2 In a large bowl, combine the flour, sugar, baking powder, and cardamom and mix until well incorporated.

ingredients.item: 3 Whisk the eggs in a small bowl, then add them to the dry ingredients along with the melted butter. Mix the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients, either using your hands or a stand mixer, until a thick cookie dough forms.
ingredients.original: 3 Whisk the eggs in a small bowl, then add them to the dry ingredients along with the melted butter. Mix the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients, either using your hands or a stand mixer, until a thick cookie dough forms.

ingredients.item: 4 Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and place in the refrigerator for 10 minutes.
ingredients.original: 4 Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and place in the refrigerator for 10 minutes.

ingredients.item: 5 Place the sesame seeds in a shallow bowl or plate. Scoop about 1 tablespoon of the cookie dough. Roll it into a thin rope, roughly 4 inches (10 cm) in length and ½ inch (1.3 cm) in width, then twist the rope into a circular shape, sticking the ends together (see Note). Dip it into the sesame seeds, covering one side of the cookie, then place it on the prepared sheet pan, seeds side up. Repeat with the remaining dough, placing them 1 inch (2.5 cm) apart and baking in batches.
ingredients.original: 5 Place the sesame seeds in a shallow bowl or plate. Scoop about 1 tablespoon of the cookie dough. Roll it into a thin rope, roughly 4 inches (10 cm) in length and ½ inch (1.3 cm) in width, then twist the rope into a circular shape, sticking the ends together (see Note). Dip it into the sesame seeds, covering one side of the cookie, then place it on the prepared sheet pan, seeds side up. Repeat with the remaining dough, placing them 1 inch (2.5 cm) apart and baking in batches.

ingredients.item: 6 Bake for 15 minutes, or until the cookies are lightly golden and set. Broil for 2 to 3 minutes, until the tops are golden.
ingredients.original: 6 Bake for 15 minutes, or until the cookies are lightly golden and set. Broil for 2 to 3 minutes, until the tops are golden.
